author: va8e
content: Plan: Protocol crate defines: Message enum (Request/Response/StatusUpdate variants), Priority enum, Status enum, Request struct (source, target, title, body, priority, uuid), Response struct (source_uuid, target_uuid, body), StatusUpdate struct (uuid, old/new status). Framing uses u32 LE length prefix + postcard serialization. decode_frame reads from byte slice returning (Message, bytes_consumed). All types derive Serialize/Deserialize/Debug/Clone/PartialEq.
